description: Implement Universal Executor/Auditor Exchange Ledger Loop as roadmap step 10. Create governance/ledger/ directory structure with ledger writer contracts, routing logic, and exchange file coordination between executor and auditor roles. Establish traceable loop through ledger for all execution decisions.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap step 10 follows completed step 9 (AUDIT-AUTHORITY-LOCK-DEV-EXECUTION-LOCK). Last event shows COMPLETED status with next_actor_role ANALYST and next_expected_event VERIFICATION_REQUIRED, indicating readiness for next roadmap task proposal.
